title: ProjectBFDI (Archive)
description: Adds BFDI stuff in minecraft! (No longer gets updates)
body:
# Adds BFDI stuff in minecraft!
## Version Beta 1.2.0
### Yoyleland

Explore a new land full of mysteries! Well, kinda, but you get the point. This new land adds a new type of tree, the yoyletree! But what its so special about it, well it makes a super delicious berry that makes you full and might wanna eat it again!

Uh this is wierd yoyleland grass is too infertile for cultivating, so you go to your lab aka your crafting table and combine the dna of yoyleplants and potatoes to make growtatoes, instead of making a farming soil you decide to plant growtatoes directly and they start growing delicius growtatoes, but dont eat them, you put them on the crafting table to trasform them into delicius potatoes!

## Info!

New stuff might be announced before release! Please do not assume the stuff is already released, please just check the discord for new updates!

Anyways install the mod if you are a bfdi fan or looking for new and fun mods!
